race.comment: STARDUST MEMORIES (10) is ready for the extra ground today with the key jockey change. Away only fairly and found the 1100m too sharp with a battling fifth at this track. Having her third race start today and take control early from the good gate. Hard to hold out. MOVIE NIGHT (2) well-bred filly bursting to get off the mark at start six. Kept coming second-up with a narrow second over 1400m at Newcastle. Tricky map for this and expected to go close. STATE SECRET (1) gritty return from the outside gate with a solid on-pace second over 1200m at Wyong. Has the class to take care of this field from the inside gate. HE'S GOT GRUNT (8) returns from a lengthy break and is now in the Marc Chevalier yard. Given the two trials and kicks off on the home track with the tongue-tie coming off. Worth thought.
